name: Apple Glazed Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with salt and pepper.
2. Brown the pork roast under the broiler to remove excess fat; drain well.
3. Place apple quarters in the bottom of a crockpot.
4. Place the roast on top of the apples.
5. Combine apple juice, brown sugar, and ginger in a bowl.
6. Spoon the mixture over the top surface of the roast, moistening well.
7. Cover and cook on Low setting for 10-12 hours or until done.
